_README: Hand-rated importance for skills/agents, joined onto the usage audit by scripts/audit-usage.mjs. EDIT FREELY — these are seed guesses, not gospel. 'value' is IMPORTANCE / cost-if-missing, independent of how often it is used (frequency is the separate 'count' column). Scale: critical | high | medium | low. Leave an item out to keep it unrated (shows as '—', verdict REVIEW). 'note' is optional free text shown beneath the row. type/scope/verdict are derived automatically; you only set value + note here.

verifier.note: verification is central to the harness loop

reducer-security-auditor.note: SpacetimeDB reducer security — high blast radius

researcher.note: isolated research to protect main-session context

doc-keeper.note: keeps docs in sync with code

pixijs.note: central to the game clients; 26-skill pack auto-wired from node_modules
